feedItems.description: allocated £100.8m to Children's Social Care (≈£271 per resident)
allocated £185.3m to Adult Social Care (≈£499 per resident)
allocated £43.6m to Environment & Streets (≈£117 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £115 (5.1%) to £2392
